email-subdomain
***************


Description
===========

email subdomain details for a marketing brand


Available Commands
==================

* create

* delete

* get

* get-email-subdomain-csr

* get-email-subdomain-dns-config

* list

* request-email-subdomain-csr

* update

* upload-email-subdomain-certificate

* validate-and-configure-email-subdomain-certificate

* validate-and-configure-email-subdomain-dns
